Value: No order confirmation email sent after successful checkout completion

After completing a full checkout journey SauceDemo displays a confirmation screen but sends no order confirmation email. In a real e-commerce application an automated confirmation email is a fundamental post-purchase requirement. Documented as a real-world awareness item - expected behavior for a demo application.
2. Add any product to the cart
3. Proceed through checkout: Information > Overview > Finish
4. Confirm you are on the Thank you for your order! confirmation page
5. Check any associated email inbox for a confirmation email
In a real production application an automated confirmation email should be sent containing: order ID, itemized product list, total amount, and estimated delivery information.
No email is sent after order completion. Confirmation exists only on the in-app screen. Once the user navigates away there is no external record of the purchase.
This is expected behavior for SauceDemo (demo app). Documented to demonstrate awareness of real-world e-commerce testing requirements.
